avoid.market: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times? (KXRATECUTCOUNT-26DEC31-T0)
avoid.reason: Passes volume/spread filters but no independent 2026 data path (FOMC minutes, SEP dots, GDPNow, claims) available without external retrieval; market already prices ~82% no-cut — cannot establish ≥8% macro edge with citable source

avoid.market: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027? (KXRATECUT-26DEC31)
avoid.reason: Near-complement of zero-cut contract; same lack of groundable real-time macro inputs; implied ~19% already tight to hold-through-2026 consensus priced in-market

avoid.market: Will there be a recession in 2027? (KXRECSSNBER-27)
avoid.reason: Long-dated binary; resolution window through 2027; 42.5% mid is plausible prior with wide uncertainty — no specific BEA/NBER-trackable catalyst today for ≥8% edge

avoid.market: Same-day / weekly Brent, gold, silver, copper thresholds

avoid.market: Q3 2026 GDP ladder and hurricane season binaries

notes: Regime read from curve shape only: markets price sticky ~3.3% CPI, ~2% Q2 growth, and ~80%+ odds of zero 2026 cuts with gold/oil elevated — consistent with neutral-to-mildly-inflationary hold. Strict filters leave five liquid macros; none offer a citable, non-fabricated disagreement ≥ category edge vs provided mids. Zero trades is the correct output when grounding_source cannot be produced from supplied data alone.
